summary: Completed testing of iteration 26 features. All 6 features verified and working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 features tested and verified working in iteration 26.

master_admin_promote_basic_admin_without.details: Master admin can promote member to basic_admin without secret code. Backend endpoint at /api/admin/upgrade-role allows master_admin to bypass secret code requirement. Frontend shows 'As Master Admin, you can promote directly without secret code' message.

master_admin_promote_super_admin_without.details: Master admin can promote member to super_admin without secret code. Backend code at line 3875 checks if user.role == 'master_admin' and bypasses secret code validation.

non_master_admin_needs_secret_for_super_.details: Non-master admins still need secret code for super_admin promotion. Backend code at lines 3877-3882 requires secret_code == SUPER_ADMIN_SECRET for non-master admins.

lot_size_calculation_account_value_divid.details: LOT Size in Member Details shows account_value / 980 calculation. Screenshot shows LOT Size: 20.41 with 'Based on $20,000' (20000/980 = 20.41). Formula also shown in Dashboard Your Stats card.

licensee_onboarding_tour_5_steps.details: Licensee onboarding tour has 5 steps (licenseeTourSteps array): 1) Welcome, 2) Dashboard, 3) Profit Tracker, 4) Deposit & Withdrawal, 5) Ready. Regular member tour has 8 steps (memberTourSteps).

dashboard_your_stats_replaces_live_rates.details: Dashboard shows 'Your Stats' card instead of 'Live Rates'. Card displays: Total Profit, LOT Size (with 'Based on account value'), Projected Daily (with 'LOT × 15 multiplier'), Performance Rate.

api_tests.POST /api/admin/upgrade-role: PASS - Master admin can promote without secret code
api_tests.GET /api/admin/members: PASS - Returns members list with account_value
api_tests.GET /api/admin/members/{id}: PASS - Returns member details with stats
api_tests.GET /api/admin/members/{id}/simulate: PASS - Returns simulation data with lot_size calculated as account_value/980
api_tests.GET /api/profit/summary: PASS - Returns data for Your Stats card

ui_tests.dashboard_your_stats_card: PASS - Shows Total Profit, LOT Size, Projected Daily, Performance Rate
ui_tests.member_details_lot_size: PASS - Shows LOT Size with 'Based on $X' formula
ui_tests.upgrade_role_dialog: PASS - Shows Basic Admin, Admin, Super Admin options
ui_tests.master_admin_bypass_message: PASS - Shows 'As Master Admin, you can promote directly without secret code'
ui_tests.no_secret_code_input_for_master_admin: PASS - Secret code input not shown for master admin
